verified.name: English Random Words
verified.tagline: One random English word with a definition and pronunciation
verified.description: Hits a single GET and returns a random English word bundled with its short definition and a pronunciation hint. Handy for word-of-the-day widgets, vocabulary drills, or seeding test data. No key, no params required.

sampleJson.definition: Object whose reality defined by reason rather than perception

verified.name: OpenSky Network
verified.tagline: Live ADS-B aircraft state vectors over a bounding box
verified.description: Returns real-time state vectors (position, altitude, velocity, heading) for aircraft currently tracked by the OpenSky sensor network. Anonymous requests work without a key but are throttled and coarsened in time resolution. Great for flight-tracking maps and airspace dashboards.
verified.freeTier: Free for non-commercial/research use; anonymous requests are rate-limited and time-coarsened
verified.rateLimit: Anonymous access throttled; registered/OAuth users get higher limits
verified.notes: access-control-allow-origin header is present but pinned to https://opensky-network.org, so browser calls from other origins are blocked; corsObserved marked false.

verified.name: Dicebear Avatars
verified.tagline: Deterministic avatars returned as JSON-wrapped SVG
verified.description: Generates a seeded, deterministic avatar in the requested style and, via the /json format, returns the SVG markup inside a JSON object instead of a raw image. Same seed always yields the same face, so it doubles as stable placeholder art. Many styles plus fully self-hostable.

sampleJson.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" shape-rendering="crispEdges"><metadata>...Pixel Art by DiceBear, CC0 1.0...</metadata><mask id="viewboxMask">...</svg>

verified.freeTier: Free; open-source and self-hostable public API
verified.dataLicense: DiceBear code MIT; individual avatar styles under their own licenses (Pixel Art is CC0 1.0)

verified.name: Transport for Los Angeles, US
verified.tagline: LA Metro bus and rail route overviews, keyless JSON
verified.description: The LA Metro API (v2.1.38) serves GTFS-derived route, stop, shape and real-time trip data for LACMTA bus and rail, all keyless with CORS enabled. The route_overview endpoint lists every line with names, colors, terminals and timetable PDFs. Agency id must be LACMTA or LACMTA_Rail.

sampleJson.route_desc: W HOLLYWOOD-DTWN LA -AVALON STA VIA MELROSE-AVALON

verified.name: airportsapi
verified.tagline: Look up an airport's name and website by ICAO code
verified.description: Give it a four-letter ICAO code and it returns the airport's official name and homepage URL as JSON. Minimal but keyless, with CORS enabled for browser use. The underlying dataset is static and hasn't been refreshed since 2017.
verified.notes: Static dataset; airport records last updated 2017.
